rationale: printResult(r: HealthResult) is a pure dispatcher over a 3-variant discriminated union. Property: ∀r ∈ HealthResult, printResult(r) emits exactly: icon(status) + name + detail + (status === 'ok' ? '' : lines.join('\n')). The union has finitely many shapes; L0.types-2/3/4 instantiate each variant. Generative PBT is unnecessary — case-exhaustion via the type system IS the verification.
